problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
